statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{id: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:OCIKmsVault)-[:OCI_KMS_KEY]->(n:OCIKmsKey) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{id: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:OCIKmsVault)-[r:OCI_KMS_KEY]->(:OCIKmsKey) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{id: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIKmsVault) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{id: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIKmsVault) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
